statement: In every magma, Equation 2495 (`x = (y * ((x * x) * x)) * z`) implies Equation 3854 (`x * y = (z * w) * (w * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0851
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x x) x)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) (op w w))
